history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02, column B, facing right (`>`). The cell directly ahead (row 02, column C) is lava (L), so I cannot move forward. I need to change direction. Turning clockwise will make me face down, allowing me to move to row 03, column B which is safe floor. This is the first step toward reaching the goal at row 04, column D.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 2, column B, facing down. The cell directly ahead (row 3, column B) is floor (`.`), so it is safe to move forward. This will bring me closer to the goal at row 4, column D.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 3, column B, facing down. Moving forward would go to row 4, column B, which is floor, but from there the only way to the goal (row 4, column D) would require moving right through lava at (4, C). A better path is to go right first to (3, C), then right again to (3, D), then down to (4, D). So I need to turn clockwise to face right.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at (3, B) facing left. To reach the goal at (4, D), I need to move right to (3, C), then right to (3, D), then down. So I must first turn to face right. From left, two clockwise rotations give right. One clockwise turn gives up.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at (3, B) facing up. To reach the goal at (4, D), I need to go right first. I will turn clockwise to face right.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at (3, B) facing right. The next cell forward is (3, C), which is safe floor. I will move forward to approach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am now at (3, C) facing right. The cell ahead is (3, D), which is floor. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal at (4, D).
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at (3, D) facing right. The cell ahead is (3, E) which is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The goal is at (4, D), directly below me. I need to turn clockwise to face down.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at (3, D) facing down. The cell directly ahead is (4, D), which contains the goal 'O'. Moving forward will reach the goal. This is safe and correct.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
